summary: Combines optional base information with a resource reference, resolves it relative to an optional map location, and returns a normalized URL or path.
signature_intent: Accepts an optional root prefix, a resource reference, and an optional map location, producing a normalized resolved reference.
behavior: Defaults a missing resource reference to an empty string.
Prepends a provided root prefix to the resource reference.
Adds a single path separator between the root prefix and resource reference when both are relative segments without a boundary separator.
When a map location is provided, resolves the current reference relative to the directory containing that map location.
Returns the resolved reference after normalization.
edge_cases: A root prefix ending with a separator is used as-is.
A resource reference beginning with a separator is not given an extra separator.
A missing root prefix leaves the resource reference unchanged before map-based resolution.
An unparsable map location causes an error.
An empty resource reference can still resolve to the provided root or map-relative base.
